basic_details.job_title: DHFWS Kolar Recruitment 2026 - Walkin for 15Medical Officer, Junior Lab Technician and More Posts
basic_details.organization_name: District Health and Family Welfare Society, Kolar (DHFWS Kolar)
basic_details.post_name: Medical Officer, Junior Lab Technician, Pharmacist, Junior Primary Health Care Officer
basic_details.short_information: District Health and Family Welfare Society, Kolar (DHFWS Kolar) has released an official notification for Walk-in Interview for 15 Medical Officer, Junior Lab Technician, Pharmacist, Junior Primary Health Care Officer Posts. Eligible candidates can attend the Walk-in Interview on Every Monday 11:00 AM at the DHFWS Kolar office with original documents and self-attested copies.

age_limit.age_details: Max 60 years for Medical Officer, Max 45 years for Lab Technician and Nurse, Max 40 years for Junior Primary Health Care Officer
age_limit.details: Maximum age limit is 60 years for all posts.

qualification.education_qualification: MBBS with Karnataka Medical Council registration, SSLC/PUC + DMLT with Karnataka State Medical Board registration and computer literacy, B.Sc/B.Pharm with registration and computer literacy, KMTC training with Karnataka State Medical Board registration and computer literacy
qualification.details: Medical Officer: MBBS degree and registration with Karnataka Medical Council. Junior Laboratory Technical Officer: SSLC/PUC and DMLT diploma, mandatory registration with Karnataka State Medical Board and computer literacy. Pharmacist Officer: B.Sc/B.Pharm registration in Nursing and computer literacy. Junior Primary Health Care Officer: KMTC training, mandatory registration with Karnataka State Medical Board and computer literacy.

salary_details.details: Medical Officer: Rs. 60000/- Per Month Junior Laboratory Technical Officer: Rs. 16067/- Per Month Pharmacist Officer: Rs. 16067/- Per Month Junior Primary Health Care Officer: Rs. 15667/- Per Month

content_sections.heading: DHFWS Kolar Vacancy 2026 Notification PDF
content_sections.text: Candidates who are interested in applying for the DHFWS Kolar Recruitment 2026 should first download and carefully read the official notification PDF. The notification contains complete details about vacancy distribution, eligibility criteria, age limit, stipend/salary, selection process, important dates, and application instructions. Reading the official document is important to ensure that you meet all requirements before submitting the application form. Download DHFWS Kolar Job 2026 Notification PDF

content_sections.heading: Eligibility Criteria
content_sections.text: Medical Officer: MBBS degree and registration with Karnataka Medical Council. Junior Laboratory Technical Officer: SSLC/PUC and DMLT diploma, mandatory registration with Karnataka State Medical Board and computer literacy. Pharmacist Officer: B.Sc/B.Pharm registration in Nursing and computer literacy. Junior Primary Health Care Officer: KMTC training, mandatory registration with Karnataka State Medical Board and computer literacy.

content_sections.heading: Age Limit
content_sections.text: Maximum age limit is 60 years for all posts.

content_sections.heading: Salary / Stipend
content_sections.text: Medical Officer: Rs. 60000/- Per Month Junior Laboratory Technical Officer: Rs. 16067/- Per Month Pharmacist Officer: Rs. 16067/- Per Month Junior Primary Health Care Officer: Rs. 15667/- Per Month

content_sections.heading: Walk-In Procedure
content_sections.text: Read the official notification carefully before attending the interview. Candidates must report at the venue as per the reporting time mentioned in the notification. Carry all original documents along with one set of self-attested photocopies such as ID proof, educational certificates, experience certificates (if required), and category certificate (if applicable). Bring the duly filled application form if required in the notification. Verify eligibility criteria before attending the interview. Candidates are advised to reach the venue well in advance to complete registration formalities. Keep extra passport-size photographs for submission if required.

faq.question: Q1. What is the total number of vacancies released by DHFWS Kolar?
faq.answer: DHFWS Kolar has announced a total of 15 vacancies for various posts including Medical Officer, Junior Lab Technician, Pharmacist, and Junior Primary Health Care Officer.

faq.question: Q2. What is the application mode for DHFWS Kolar recruitment?
faq.answer: The application mode for this recruitment is Walk-in. Candidates need to attend the interview directly at the specified venue and time.

faq.question: Q3. What is the last date to attend the walk-in interview?
faq.answer: The walk-in interviews are scheduled to be held every Monday at 11:00 AM.

faq.question: Q4. What is the maximum age limit for the Medical Officer post?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit for the Medical Officer post is 60 years.

faq.question: Q5. What are the educational qualifications required for the Junior Laboratory Technical Officer post?
faq.answer: For the Junior Laboratory Technical Officer post, candidates need to have SSLC/PUC and a DMLT diploma, along with mandatory registration with the Karnataka State Medical Board and computer literacy.

faq.question: Q6. Is there any application fee for DHFWS Kolar recruitment?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee mentioned for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) for this recruitment.

faq.question: Q7. What is the salary offered for the Pharmacist Officer post?
faq.answer: The Pharmacist Officer post offers a salary of Rs. 16067/- per month.

faq.question: Q8. What documents should I carry for the walk-in interview?
faq.answer: Candidates must carry all original documents, one set of self-attested photocopies, ID proof, educational certificates, experience certificates (if any), and category certificates (if applicable).

faq.question: Q9. What is the selection process for DHFWS Kolar recruitment?
faq.answer: The selection process involves a Walk-in Interview followed by Document Verification.

faq.question: Q10. Where can I find the official notification for DHFWS Kolar recruitment?
faq.answer: The official notification can be accessed through the "Important Links" section of this article, under the "Official Notification PDF" heading.
